branding.tagline: Primary-source analysis of the public record.

tags.label: Confirmed
tags.description: In the documents, court records, or official filings. Verifiable primary source.

tags.label: Corroborated
tags.description: Evaluated as credible by trained federal investigators across multiple reviews. A distinct legal/investigative category.

tags.label: Documented Claim
tags.description: Stated in official documents (deposition, sworn testimony, filing) but not independently corroborated.

tags.label: Confirmed Govt Action
tags.description: A government action is confirmed even where underlying motive is unknown.

tags.label: Anomalous
tags.description: A confirmed fact that is procedurally or legally extraordinary on its face. The anomaly is observable in the record itself.
